capability_classification_corrections.reason: Sprint 3 governance matrix: messaging gateways DISABLED/REMOVE (T1 — highest tier). Currently DISABLED in Sprint 4 baseline. Re-enabling requires new explicit Product Owner decision and activation gate.
Sprint 3 governance: memory writes are draft_only (staged, non-bypassable, human acceptance required). ADAPT understates the constraint.
Sprint 5 local candidate implementation confirms REBUILD_IN_MAGNA path. Ambiguity removed.

capability_classification_corrections.note: Correct in direction but must add: disabled by default per Sprint 3/4; requires separate activation gate; policy engine must be verified before activation.
ADOPT_IN_MAGNA is non-standard decision class. Use ADOPT; note PR #33 as prerequisite branding dependency, not a Hermes capability decision.
